---
title: "exploration"
author: "Mattis"
date: "2026-04-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)

```


```{r}

data <- read_csv("./data/cogsci_clean.csv")


```

```{r}

## Visualizing FirstRating 

data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = FirstRating)) +
  geom_histogram()


## Visualizing GroupRating

data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = GroupRating)) +
  geom_histogram()


## Visualizing SecondRating

data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = SecondRating)) +
  geom_histogram()

```

```{r}

## Simulating the face rating game 


# Generate 100 face stimuli in a dataframe 

set.seed(2001) 

face_stimuli <- data.frame(
  FaceID = 1:100)


# We generate the FirstRating and GroupRating data 

face_stimuli <- face_stimuli %>%
  mutate(FirstRating = sample(1:8, 100, replace = TRUE),
         GroupRating = sample(1:8, 100, replace = TRUE))






```
